### **Our Mission**

At Little Friends Learning Loft, we are all passionate about providing a safe setting that ensures peace, empathy and compassion. Respect is modeled, taught and practiced. Our intentional and nurturing environment is founded on the Montessori principles of hands-on learning, self-discovery, cooperation and independence. The multi-age group benefits apply to all; younger children learn by observing their older classmates and older children gain the satisfaction and confidence that comes from providing support and encouragement. Years 1, 2 and 3 are designed to help students reach multiple tiers of educational, social and emotional goals at a pace befitting each individual learner.

## Child-led play

**We invite i** **ndividually motivated experiences** **and practice exploration in our** **playground** **, garden, yoga studio, gymnasium, art room and library all while nourishing a spiritual sense of wonder and respect for our natural world and its inhabitants. Providing these introductions and promoting self-paced learning environments encourages autonomy, character development and helps raise good citizens for our future.**

![Sharing something to brighten your Monday! 💛  Long before Kindergarten, something remarkable happens on a little mat on the classroom floor. A child reaches into a wooden box of red and blue letters and begins to write. Not with a pencil, not with a worksheet, but with their own two hands and their own story to tell. We start simply and personally: finding the letter sounds in their name, then spelling out family, maybe freinds or pets, the people who make up their whole world. Phonemes become symbols and thoughts become visible, one sound at a time. Phonemic awareness is simply the ability to hear and play with the individual sounds in words, and it is the single greatest predictor of future reading success. The Movable Alphabet makes this invisible skill come alive, as children physically reach for each sound and give it a shape. For a three, four, or five year old, this isn’t a lesson but a fun discovery. The realization that their voice has shape, that their stories matter enough to be written down. There is no right or wrong spelling at this stage, no correction, no pressure, just joyful exploration. What begins as a name becomes a family and then a sentence. And what begins as a sentence becomes a child who knows, deeply and confidently, that they are a writer and soon to be reader! 👏🏽 #apreschoolgrowsinnewburgh #moveablealphabet](https://scontent-iad3-2.cdninstagram.com/v/t51.82787-15/657277882_18088404902585889_4484571451039148295_n.jpg?stp=dst-jpg_e35_tt6&_nc_cat=103&ccb=7-5&_nc_sid=18de74&efg=eyJlZmdfdGFnIjoiQ0FST1VTRUxfSVRFTS5iZXN0X2ltYWdlX3VybGdlbi5DMyJ9&_nc_ohc=tuF7gHQlvLsQ7kNvwH1iS4d&_nc_oc=AdoQ5-lE_PTA5n4DruqZs5ap6_aICBnP3lMngcpcm_tngflVsd1Z1pMyZmX9Uh1LEPU&_nc_zt=23&_nc_ht=scontent-iad3-2.cdninstagram.com&edm=ANo9K5cEAAAA&_nc_gid=EVDLeFOxa27aVckqT2qofw&_nc_tpa=Q5bMBQEZmSJXH72vPrBqI331x_EfCe4RifxpvbuI2Kli0XP60CaNxU_t9C8eEXRvGzCmMISDP0nU1d1UuQ&oh=00_Af-DY5MZNg22crkRvcjGVZ9wtMrU9ZHKKxa3FRj_zI_jRw&oe=6A26F45B)

### “I can’t say enough good things about the Little Friends program. It has brought quality Montessori education to my son and allowed him to grow up slow in a safe and nature-oriented environment. They are doing important work in Newburgh!”

## About the Newburgh JCC Community

**The Newburgh Jewish Community Center is a dynamic and impactful social meeting place in Newburgh that serves one and all. Staff, leadership, and members are committed to the Jewish value of Tikkun Olam (making the world a better place). We do this through programming, partnerships, philanthropic endeavors and community-building. By focusing on enrichment, educational, cultural and social engagement touchpoints we are able to provide a place where there is something for everyone.**
